name: AgentKit
description: World AgentKit support for human-backed delegation and World ID HITL approvals.

walletAddress.label: Agent Wallet Address
walletAddress.help: Wallet address to register with World AgentKit for human-backed agent delegation.

cli.command.label: AgentKit CLI Command
cli.command.help: Executable used for the local AgentKit registration flow. Defaults to 'agentkit'.

cli.args.label: AgentKit CLI Arguments
cli.args.help: Optional fixed arguments prepended before `register <wallet>`, for example ["-y", "@worldcoin/agentkit-cli"] when using npx.

hitl.enabled.label: Enable AgentKit HITL
hitl.enabled.help: Require OpenClaw plugin approvals for selected tools until either a delegation grant or a World human approval proof is established.

hitl.mode.label: HITL Mode
hitl.mode.help: Choose whether protected tools use AgentBook-backed delegation (`delegation`) or World ID approval proofs (`human-approval`).

hitl.resourceUrl.label: HITL Protected Resource URL
hitl.resourceUrl.help: AgentKit-protected resource URL used to verify proof-backed delegation before resolving pending approvals in `delegation` mode.

hitl.protectedTools.label: HITL Protected Tools
hitl.protectedTools.help: Tool names that should pause for human-backed authorization before they can run, for example ["exec"].

hitl.severity.label: HITL Approval Severity
hitl.severity.help: Severity shown on the pending AgentKit approval request.

hitl.timeoutMs.label: HITL Approval Timeout
hitl.timeoutMs.help: Milliseconds before a pending AgentKit approval expires.

hitl.grantScope.label: HITL Grant Scope
hitl.grantScope.help: Whether successful AgentKit delegation applies to the current session or the current agent.

hitl.grantTtlMs.label: HITL Grant TTL
hitl.grantTtlMs.help: Milliseconds that an allow-always AgentKit delegation grant stays valid.

hitl.grantsFile.label: HITL Grants File
hitl.grantsFile.help: Optional override path for the AgentKit HITL grant store.

hitl.humanApproval.provider.label: World Approval Provider
hitl.humanApproval.provider.help: Use a configured hosted World approval broker, or custom credentials for self-hosted and enterprise deployments.

hitl.humanApproval.brokerUrl.label: World Approval Broker URL
hitl.humanApproval.brokerUrl.help: Required hosted broker endpoint that signs short-lived World approval requests without exposing a World signing key to OpenClaw clients.

hitl.humanApproval.appId.label: World App ID
hitl.humanApproval.appId.help: World ID app_id from the Developer Portal used for custom QR-based human approvals.

hitl.humanApproval.rpId.label: World RP ID
hitl.humanApproval.rpId.help: World ID rp_id from the Developer Portal used to verify custom human approval proofs.

hitl.humanApproval.signingKey.label: World Signing Key
hitl.humanApproval.signingKey.help: World ID signing key used to sign custom approval requests. Prefer a secret or environment indirection outside committed config.

hitl.humanApproval.signingKeyEnvVar.label: World Signing Key Env Var
hitl.humanApproval.signingKeyEnvVar.help: Environment variable name that contains the World ID signing key for custom QR-based human approvals.

hitl.humanApproval.environment.label: World Environment
hitl.humanApproval.environment.help: World environment for human approval requests (`production` or `staging`).

hitl.humanApproval.actionPrefix.label: World Approval Action Prefix
hitl.humanApproval.actionPrefix.help: Prefix used when binding a World approval proof to a specific pending OpenClaw approval.
